subject: Augnes Console public read-only app
summary: Fixture-safe casefile for the Augnes Console starter. The public ChatGPT App is a read-only surface over Augnes Core, with file mode currently backing all nine public tools through local read-only fixtures.

supportingEvidence.title: Public tool surface remains exactly nine read-only tools
supportingEvidence.note: Invariant checks assert the intended public tools and read-only annotations.

supportingEvidence.title: Working View fixture is read from a local file
supportingEvidence.note: Sprint 3A introduced file-backed get_working_view without adding write behavior.

supportingEvidence.title: Casefile fixture is read from a local file
supportingEvidence.note: Sprint 3B adds file-backed open_casefile while keeping all other unresolved real read paths mock-backed.

contradictingEvidence.title: Augnes HTTP API is not finalized
contradictingEvidence.note: File mode is an interim read seam, not the final Core-backed adapter.

unresolvedQuestions: Which Augnes Core casefile endpoint contract should replace the file-backed seam?
How should casefile lookup by subject map to canonical Augnes identifiers once HTTP mode is finalized?
recentChanges: Sprint 2A validated all nine read-only tools in ChatGPT Developer Mode.
Sprint 3A connected get_working_view to a file-backed read source.
Sprint 3B connects open_casefile to a file-backed read source.
